verses.text: He shaves his head and beard and divides the hair: a third burned, a third struck with the knife, a third scattered to the wind, a few kept in his skirts. A picture of the city's fate. Judgment will fall by fire, sword, and dispersion.

He shaves his head and beard and divides the hair: a third burned, a third struck with the knife, a third scattered to the wind, a few kept in his skirts. A picture of the city's fate. Judgment will fall by fire, sword, and dispersion.

He shaves his head and beard and divides the hair: a third burned, a third struck with the knife, a third scattered to the wind, a few kept in his skirts. A picture of the city's fate. Judgment will fall by fire, sword, and dispersion.

He shaves his head and beard and divides the hair: a third burned, a third struck with the knife, a third scattered to the wind, a few kept in his skirts. A picture of the city's fate. Judgment will fall by fire, sword, and dispersion.
This is Jerusalem, set in the midst of the nations, yet she has rebelled against God's laws 'more than the nations.' Privilege abused. The more light a people has, the greater their guilt in sin.
This is Jerusalem, set in the midst of the nations, yet she has rebelled against God's laws 'more than the nations.' Privilege abused. The more light a people has, the greater their guilt in sin.
This is Jerusalem, set in the midst of the nations, yet she has rebelled against God's laws 'more than the nations.' Privilege abused. The more light a people has, the greater their guilt in sin.
God Himself is against her; fathers shall eat sons and sons fathers, and the remnant be scattered to every wind. Horror upon horror. Unrepented sin unravels even the bonds of family.
God Himself is against her; fathers shall eat sons and sons fathers, and the remnant be scattered to every wind. Horror upon horror. Unrepented sin unravels even the bonds of family.
God Himself is against her; fathers shall eat sons and sons fathers, and the remnant be scattered to every wind. Horror upon horror. Unrepented sin unravels even the bonds of family.
Because she defiled His sanctuary, a third shall die by plague and famine, a third by the sword, a third be scattered. The measure is full. To pollute God's holy place invites a threefold ruin.
Because she defiled His sanctuary, a third shall die by plague and famine, a third by the sword, a third be scattered. The measure is full. To pollute God's holy place invites a threefold ruin.
Thus His anger is accomplished, and she becomes 'a reproach... an astonishment' to the nations around. A warning to all. God's judgment on His own people instructs the watching world.
Thus His anger is accomplished, and she becomes 'a reproach... an astonishment' to the nations around. A warning to all. God's judgment on His own people instructs the watching world.
Thus His anger is accomplished, and she becomes 'a reproach... an astonishment' to the nations around. A warning to all. God's judgment on His own people instructs the watching world.
He will loose the arrows of famine, wild beasts, plague, and the sword upon her. Every scourge is His. The instruments of destruction all serve the purpose of God.
